use_cases: Immersive 3D product galleries for e-commerce platforms
Portfolio showcases for creative professionals and designers
Interactive invitation or artwork displays with floating card effects
Click-to-expand modal views for detailed image inspection
ai_summary: An immersive 3D image gallery featuring floating cards in a stellar space environment with Three.js rendering. Uses orbit controls for spatial navigation, click-to-reveal modals for detailed viewing, and a context-based state system. Includes starfield and galaxy backgrounds with floating card animations, making it ideal for creative portfolios, product showcases, and visual galleries requiring an engaging 3D experience.
